plist.dict:
Label com.family.calendar.sync
ProgramArguments
/usr/bin/swift /Users/yourname/family_calendar_sync.swift
RunAtLoad
#The 5pm runtime StartCalendarInterval
Hour 17 Minute 0
StandardOutPath /Users/yourname/Library/Application Support/family_calendar_sync/launchd.out
StandardErrorPath /Users/yourname/Library/Application Support/family_calendar_sync/launchd.err
